channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: De La Salle beats Bellarmine in NorCal playoff barnburner between storied Bay Area programs
item.description: 2025 NorCal Division I soccer playoffs: Ronan Rattigan scores twice in the second half to close out Bellarmine
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Outfielder Lawrence Butler agrees to $65.5 million, 7-year deal with A's, AP source says
item.description: Outfielder Lawrence Butler agreed to a $65.5 million, seven-year contract with the Athletics, a person with direct knowledge of the negotiations said Thursday night, the latest big-money deal for a team suddenly spending as it prepares to play three seasons in a minor league ballpark.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harden scores 50 points for 1st time with Clippers as Los Angeles beats Pistons 123-115
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden scored 50 points, his 24th career 50-point game and first with the Clippers, and Los Angeles beat the Detroit Pistons 123-115 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucks' Giannis Antetokounmpo says consistency of his work ethic helped him join 20,000-point club
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo believes his latest milestone should serve as a testament to his consistent work ethic.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chargers release linebacker Joey Bosa after 9 seasons with the franchise
item.description: The Los Angeles Chargers released Joey Bosa on Wednesday night, ending the linebacker's nine-season tenure with the franchise. The move, which came less than a week before the start of the new league year, was expected due to Bosa's large salary cap number and injury history.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 59, Fairmont Prep 55
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- 2025 CIF State Boys Basketball Championships Division I Carlsbad defeated Fairmont Prep 59-55. The visitors made the trek from Anaheim, and they could not slow down UCSD commit Jake Hall who hit for a game high 32 points for the Lancers.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Green Day's Billie Joe Armstrong, rapper Too Short join Oakland Ballers' ownership group
item.description: (KRON) -- East Bay rap icon Too Short and Green Day frontman Billie Joe Armstrong are getting behind the Oakland Ballers. The team announced on Wednesday that the two internationally renowned musicians -- both of whom have East Bay roots -- will be joining the team's ownership group.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being face of NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner climbed the world's 14 highest peaks without oxygen or porters
item.description: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner, an Austrian-born mountaineer, became the first woman to climb the world's 14 highest peaks without the help of oxygen or porters.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Celtics honor Somerset teen who saved choking girl
item.description: Ben Courville, a junior firefighter with the Dighton Fire Department, saved a girl last summer from choking at a Fall River restaurant.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Runnin' Utes trounce Arizona State, 99-73
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Ezra Ausar scored 25 points and Utah put up 58 points in the second half to pull away from Arizona State to earn its first win under interim coach Josh Eilert, 99-73 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC makes its home debut before a sellout crowd in a city hungry for top-level soccer
item.description: A match decades in the making finally happens Saturday night when San Diego FC debuts on its home field in front of a sellout crowd of fans starved for elite professional sports — and particularly hungry for top-level soccer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, Fox 5

item.title: Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg kicks off
item.description: It's time for everyone to start their engines as the Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg kicks off on Friday, February 28.
item.dc:creator: Alessandra Young, WFLA, NBC
